positive: A highly stylized, abstract illustration of a wandering forest spirit creature (sylph or sprite type), rendered with clean, thick outlines and bold silhouette. The creature should be depicted among stylized, oversized flora (ferns, glowing mushrooms, winding vines). Use a deep, rich jewel-tone color palette: sapphire blues, emerald greens, and amethyst purple, contrasted sharply with negative space and crisp white highlights. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for repeat pattern or central apparel graphic. Flat vector art style meets bioluminescent stained glass aesthetic. High contrast, graphic design quality, designed for screen printing.
negative: photorealism, blurry, noisy, poor anatomy, low contrast, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, muddy colors, extra limbs, multiple subjects, ugly, artifacts
